title: arabis viridis var. heterophylla
intro: Arabis viridis var. heterophylla, also known as the green rock cress or alpine rock cress, is a plant species within the family Brassicaceae. The medicinal properties of Arabis viridis var. heterophylla include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of sulfur compounds and essential oils. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use in treating skin conditions, such as eczema and acne. Arabis viridis var. heterophylla can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and salves, which are often used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
